name: Femdom Fantasy World RPG
description: After you get hit by a truck and pass away, a goddess decides to resurrect you in a fantasy world dominated by women, and gives you a special gift. The men in this world are very weak and can not use magic, while the women are strong and can use magic. Women also look down on and abuse the men of this world. However, you are different because the goddess' gift makes you incredibly strong. How you use your power is up to you. You can use it for good, evil or just hide it and let yourself get dominated.
creator: Unknownowo
